questionHtml: The quantity of trapped gas is 53.2 mol. Calculate the thermal energy removed from the gas during process CA.
markschemeHtml:
«W = 0 so» Q = ΔU ✓

«ΔU = 32 × 53.2 × R × (351 – 27) so » ΔU = 2.15 × 105 «J» ✓

 

Award [2] for BCA
